1871760.name: Vavala
1871760.description:
Vavala is not a simple puzzles and riddles adventure.
Its atmosphere and artwork will turn the different challenges of each stage into real feats, making your journey a unique and beautiful experience.

Enter this dreamlike world full of mysteries. Accompany the nameless girl during her journey, overcoming the various feats and challenges that will stand in her way. Discover the dark origin and motivation of her journey...
1871760.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语
